articles.title: US says it struck Iranian radar sites as Kuwait reports missile and drone attacks
articles.description: Iran and the US say they have carried out fresh attacks around the Strait of Hormuz, the third known escalation in a week.

articles.title: Iran attacks damage 20 US military sites since start of war, satellite images show
articles.description: Analysts told BBC Verify that Tehran's strikes were more extensive than publicly acknowledged.

articles.title: Ministers braced as Mandelson document release will expose government working
articles.description: The documents will offer a fascinating internal insight into how government works, including the way information flows and disagreements.

articles.title: 'Don't be too kind': Maternity staff used offensive terms to refer to patients
articles.description: BBC Panorama has seen documents and spoken to former midwives from Nottingham University Hospitals NHS Trust.
